what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline icon depicting a floor plan with an outer rectangular boundary and internal divider lines.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox, width, and height all set for a 24px icon.
Has no fill and uses currentColor for the stroke, making the icon inherit text color.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
Contains three path elements: one outer rectangle-like boundary and two internal partition path groups.
standouts: Compact floor-plan geometry built from path commands.
No embedded metadata, title, or accessibility label.
conventions: Follows common icon conventions: 24x24 viewBox, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps and joins.
Uses path elements rather than rect or line primitives.
Keeps all geometry inline in a single SVG element.
notes: This file is a themeable outline floor-plan icon asset.
questions: Should this icon include a title or aria attributes when used directly?
Are the internal partition shapes meant to represent a specific floor-plan layout or only a generic symbol?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a floor plan icon, and the SVG draws a floor-plan-like outline with internal partitions.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable floor-plan symbol that can adapt to surrounding UI color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable floor-plan outline icon that a fused system would keep as a visual asset for representing spatial layout or plans.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon showing a rectangular floor plan with internal divider lines.
intention_for_embedding: This icon was for representing floor plans or spatial layouts in a design-system asset set.
